priority_basis: M-001 is complete; the prior continuity handoff identified commit/decision history and contradiction-safe additive records as the next work. The highest-risk unresolved substrate issue was cross-location record integrity.
action: Add an executable aggregation validator for the monolithic continuity index and additive record directory, preserve the architectural decision as CM-0011, and verify adversarial graph-integrity cases.
verification: Four deterministic Node tests passed with zero failures using byte-identical pre-commit validator and test content.

claim_state_map.observed: Continuity records currently occupy both operations/continuity/continuity-index.json and operations/continuity/records/.
claim_state_map.inferred: Unvalidated aggregation can create duplicate identities and dangling contradiction or supersession links.
claim_state_map.proposed: Wire the validator into CI and optionally add source-locator existence checks.
claim_state_map.superseded: No historical record was marked superseded during this slice.
claim_state_map.unresolved: Automatic merge blocking and source-locator verification remain absent.

privacy_boundary: Public repository sources and synthetic fixtures only; no private chat or sensitive personal material was published.
next_action: Wire tools/continuity/validate-continuity-records.mjs into the repository test gate, then add immutable source-locator verification without treating source existence as claim truth.
